system: two coupled LC resonator flux coordinates with one observed node
coordinate_note: Both active coordinates are flux coordinates in the same units; this card does not mix charge and flux blocks.
positive_scope: This card exposes the same hidden-renormalised visible stiffness story as coupled springs, now in a circuit substrate.
boundary: It does not describe nonlinear coupling, dissipative linewidths, drive response, or measurement back-action.
